description: A customer calls to get an update on an order they placed last week.

nodes.task_description: Ask the customer for their purchase order number or the sales order number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully gathers the identifier for the order.

nodes.task_description: Use the number to retrieve the sales order from the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the correct sales order.

nodes.task_description: Check the order's status and inform the customer that it has been shipped, providing the carrier name and tracking number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the order status is 'Shipped' and provides the customer with all relevant tracking details.
